_comment: Lab re-certification record. The engine pin (host-1 instance.json -> factorio.version) MUST equal factorio_version below, or scripts/lint-version-certification.mjs (npm run lint:version-certification, gated in CI) FAILS. A pin bump means: re-run EVERY tests/*-lab runner on the new pin, record the conclusion commit per lab here, bump factorio_version + certified_at, all in the same PR. The labs are the drift-detection suite; this record is their signed-off certificate. No escape hatch. This rule exists because 2.0.76->2.0.77 shipped real LuaSpacePlatform.destroy() semantics drift that went uncertified until a campaign audit forced the labs to re-run (measured in tests/engine-repin-lab, commit 00e44c7).

evidence.conclusion: measured export-scan residuals (the belt-restoration drift floor behind the strict gate)
temperature-key drift is a phantom (steam merges pre-export + round-trips exactly); frozen-world fluid injection + temperature-merge boundaries measured

held-item capacity is governed by the dest force's inserter research (CI bonus 0 vs local 11); set_stack clamps to physical hand capacity — and seating is ACTIVATION-INDEPENDENT (B6 refutation: deactivated fresh/settled seats fully; bonus-0 clamp identical active vs inactive; the old wake-toggle lore was dead-code misattribution). inserter-lab B7 (bake gate, unified golden-batch, two consecutive greens): a save-loaded legendary bulk-inserter holding 8 legendary railgun-ammo transfers to an asserted bonus-0 destination with the raise-only Phase-0 sync (0->11), a physically full hand, forceDataMismatches recorded, and the source deleted — the fixture's first live runs also caught and fixed two bake defects (dest lineage bonus 11; normal-quality stack self-certified by an entity-quality meter)

the synchronous held-item restore pass keeps game.tick, crafting_progress, and the restored inserter hand stable through the strict count (no craft window). no-tick-sync B8 (bake gate, unified golden-batch, two consecutive greens): the same pass reproduced construct-free from the save-loaded golden pair — fresh seating leaves tick/progress/input exactly unchanged, and a second pass under game.tick_paused=true is idempotent (restored=0, hand stays full, both entities inactive)

re-pinned engine behaviors on 2.0.77; measured the LuaSpacePlatform.destroy(0)/destroy(60) semantics drift from 2.0.76. Now re-runnable on every pin bump via the repin-consumables batch (two consecutive greens, 2026-07-19): B7 consumes the three baked hub platforms against the pinned destroy table; B8 (beacon, DISTINCT from no-tick-sync B8) proves crafting_speed rises same-execution on module population (0.75->1.2, machine frozen, no ticks); B9 proves unknown-item imports skip loud and restore valid contents (25/25 physical)

destination-hold stage/read completeness measured; isolated machine buffers survive the hold. hold-buffer-pairs (baked pairs batch, two consecutive greens 2026-07-19): across a ~5s owner-scoped window, held spoilage drift == paired live drift, zero hold-attributable damage, staged platforms go pod-free with all cargo retained (100/100 copper at stage and after); holds discard to zero records. Evidence-forced deviations documented in the manifest (asteroids baked frozen — an active one despawned from the paused golden platform; the in-flight pod is runtime-created — cargo_pod_state is read-only and a baked pod decays to ascending/force-finishes)

paired-reads census stall budget measured (R1); census commensurability on engine-owned fusion fluids proven from the save-loaded golden fixture with a working omission abort (R2, the first bake-gate batch) — the rung also exposed and fixed the schedule-less-platform transfer failure, the settled-retry duplication path, and the silent chunk-queue failure
